evals.name: claim-named-backlog-item
evals.prompt: I'd like you to pick up the inline audio player widget task from TODO.md. you're Claude 3 this session. get started.
evals.expected_output: Assistant pulls master, re-reads TODO.md, adds [Claude 3, worktree-audioplayer] tag to the inline audio player item in In Progress, flips Claude 3's status-board row to working with today's date, commits chore(todo): ... + pushes, then creates .claude/worktrees/audioplayer via git worktree add and switches into it before editing code.

evals.name: finish-and-clean
evals.prompt: the audioplayer work is done, pytest is green, just merged my PR. close it out and go idle.
evals.expected_output: Assistant pulls master, merges feature/audioplayer if not already merged, deletes local + remote branch and the worktree, removes the audioplayer item from TODO.md entirely (no 'Recently Completed' archive), flips Claude 3's status-board row back to idle / — / —, commits chore(todo): clear ... + pushes.

evals.name: block-on-external
evals.prompt: the GPU training loop work is stalled — the lambda box is down until next week. mark it blocked.
evals.expected_output: Assistant edits TODO.md: appends [BLOCKED: lambda GPU host offline until <date>] to the GPU training task line, flips the session's status-board row to blocked (yellow), commits chore(todo): block ... + pushes. Does not remove the claim or the tag.
